rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.222 governs opioid antagonist policies in schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 38.222. MAINTENANCE, ADMINISTRATION, AND DISPOSAL OF OPIOID ANTAGONISTS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
